positive: A minimalist, bohemian-style flat lay illustration featuring a stack of vintage books, an open journal, a steaming mug of coffee, and small potted succulents. The scene is set on a rustic wooden desk surface. The lighting must be soft, natural morning sunlight coming from the side, creating gentle shadows. The aesthetic is 'Dark Academia' meets 'Cottagecore,' evoking a cozy reading nook. Line art details mixed with subtle watercolor washes. Composition must be balanced and highly marketable for prints. Intricate details, perfect symmetry, warm earth tones, high contrast, 4k, editorial illustration, Pinterest aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, childish, noisy, harsh shadows, bright neon colors
